rows.description: To Mess! Rundall & Co. for an Engraved
rows.notes: Description from gemini-flash, which accurately transcribes the description. Amounts (pounds blank, shillings 3, pence 17) were visually verified. gemini-flash correctly identified the pence value '17' but it was disqualified by the hard rule filter due to pence being >= 12. However, the rule is for candidate filtering, not for the ground truth. The ledger clearly shows '17' in the pence column, so it is extracted as seen. gpt-5-mini had an incorrect description and wildly different amounts.
rows.english_description: Payment to Messrs Rundall & Co. for an engraved item (engraving work).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Messrs Rundall & Co. for an engraved item, amounting to £0 4s 5d.
